Elementwise.issues: 4 test failures (dropout, rope variants), 3 underperforming ops (bitwise_not, logical_and, logical_or at 0.33 ratio), 11 ops missing benchmarks
Elementwise.evaluation: Strong category with 82% test pass rate and most benchmarks qualified. Fix rope and dropout test failures, investigate logical/bitwise underperformance, add missing benchmarks for special_elementwise ops.

Reduce.evaluation: Perfect functional correctness with all 20 ops passing tests. No benchmark data available despite implementations existing. Add benchmark mappings to validate performance.

Norm.issues: qk_norm missing test and benchmark mapping
Norm.evaluation: Excellent functional status with 90% coverage. Add test and benchmark mapping for qk_norm to complete the category.

Conv & Pooling.evaluation: Critical gap with zero implementation. Prioritize conv2d, max_pool2d, and avg_pool2d as foundational ops for CNN workloads.

GEMM.issues: Only 3/19 ops tested, 10/19 missing implementations, 6 implemented ops lack test mappings
GEMM.evaluation: Mixed progress with core GEMM ops implemented but undertested. Add test mappings for fp8 variants and small_batch ops, implement lowbit quantized GEMM for inference optimization.

Quantize.issues: Only 2/10 ops implemented, 9/10 missing tests, critical int8/int4 quantization absent
Quantize.evaluation: Severely underdeveloped category. Implement int8_per_tensor and int4_per_block as priorities for model compression and inference acceleration.

Sampling.issues: Only 1/7 ops implemented (chain_speculative_sampling), core sampling ops missing
Sampling.evaluation: Critical gap for LLM inference. Implement top_k, top_p, and temperature_scale as essential decoding primitives.

Flash Attention.issues: 8/16 ops missing (varlen_bwd, chunked_prefill, MLA/NSA/DSA decode variants)
Flash Attention.evaluation: Solid foundation with core prefill/decode ops working. Complete varlen and paged variants for production serving, add benchmark mappings to validate performance claims.

MoE.issues: Only permute_align implemented, all fused_moe variants missing
MoE.evaluation: Minimal coverage for critical MoE workloads. Implement fused_moe_deepseek and fused_moe_qwen to support popular MoE architectures.

Linear Attention.evaluation: Good progress on gated_deltanet and GLA. Complete deltanet and retnet implementations for broader linear attention architecture support.

SSM.evaluation: Complete gap for state space models. Implement mamba1 and mamba2 to support efficient sequence modeling architectures.

overall.summary: TileOPs shows strong functional correctness in implemented categories (106/110 tests passing, 96% pass rate) but has significant coverage gaps. Three categories (Conv & Pooling, SSM, Sampling) are critically underdeveloped. Performance validation is incomplete with most benchmarks showing 'passed' status but lacking ratio data for analysis.
recommendations: Fix 4 failing tests in Elementwise (dropout, rope variants) and investigate 3 underperforming logical/bitwise ops
Implement missing core operators: conv2d/pooling (0/16), int8/int4 quantization (2/10), top_k/top_p sampling (1/7), and mamba SSM (0/2)
Add comprehensive benchmark mappings for Reduce, Norm, Flash Attention, and GEMM categories to validate performance claims and identify optimization opportunities
